title: Number of Ways to Select Buildings

testcases.input: s = "001101" Output: 6 Explanation: The following sets of indices selected are valid: - [0,2,4] from "001101" forms "010" - [0,3,4] from "001101" forms "010" - [1,2,4] from "001101" forms "010" - [1,3,4] from "001101" forms "010" - [2,4,5] from "001101" forms "101" - [3,4,5] from "001101" forms "101" No other selection is valid. Thus, there are 6 total ways.
testcases.expectedOutput: 6 Explanation: The following sets of indices selected are valid: - [0,2,4] from "001101" forms "010" - [0,3,4] from "001101" forms "010" - [1,2,4] from "001101" forms "010" - [1,3,4] from "001101" forms "010" - [2,4,5] from "001101" forms "101" - [3,4,5] from "001101" forms "101" No other selection is valid. Thus, there are 6 total ways.

testcases.input: s = "11100" Output: 0 Explanation: It can be shown that there are no valid selections.
testcases.expectedOutput: 0 Explanation: It can be shown that there are no valid selections.
